name: @my-project/plugin-office-oxide
description: Convert Office (DOCX/XLSX/PPTX) and PDF documents to Markdown or HTML using local native libraries (office-oxide, pdf-oxide) with optional MinerU cloud OCR. Supports scanned PDFs, images, table recognition, formula parsing, and configurable processing engines.
description.zh-CN: 将 Office (DOCX/XLSX/PPTX) 和 PDF 文档转换为 Markdown 或 HTML，支持本地引擎 (office-oxide, pdf-oxide) 和 MinerU 云端 OCR。支持扫描件、图片、表格识别、公式解析，处理引擎可按文件类型分别配置。
description.en-US: Convert Office (DOCX/XLSX/PPTX) and PDF documents to Markdown or HTML using local native libraries (office-oxide, pdf-oxide) with optional MinerU cloud OCR. Supports scanned PDFs, images, table recognition, formula parsing, and configurable processing engines.
author: my-project
